tagline: Tampa Bay's Trusted Custom Pool Builder

hero.headline:
Your Dream Pool, Built by the Owner
Himself
hero.subheadline: Eric Larsen is personally involved in every custom pool project from first sketch to final splash. With 18 years, 192+ five-star reviews, and a lifetime warranty you won't find anywhere else — your backyard is in the best hands in Tampa Bay.

services.label: What We Build
services.headline: Custom Pools & Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block">Designed Around Your Life
services.subtitle: From concept to completion, every Larsen's project is personally overseen by Eric Larsen. We focus on doing fewer pools exceptionally well — so yours gets the attention it deserves.

cards.title: Custom Pool Construction
cards.description: Residential shotcrete pools engineered for strength, beauty, and lasting performance. Designed to fit your property, your lifestyle, and your vision — with the owner involved at every stage.

cards.title: Pool Renovation & Remodeling
cards.description: Complete pool transformations including resurfacing, tile upgrades, equipment replacement, and deck renovations. We bring aging pools back to life with modern finishes and features.

cards.title: Spa & Water Features
cards.description: Integrated custom spas, sun shelves, waterfalls, and fountains that turn your backyard into a private resort. Each element is designed to complement your pool perfectly.

cards.title: Fire Features & Outdoor Living
cards.description: Custom fire bowls, fire pits, and fire walls designed to extend your poolside evenings. Create a resort-style ambiance that makes your backyard the favorite gathering spot.

cards.title: 3D Pool Design
cards.description: See your dream pool before a single shovel hits the ground. Our advanced 3D visualization lets you explore every detail and make confident decisions before construction begins.

cards.title: Service & Maintenance
cards.description: A dedicated service department for warranty work, equipment repairs, and ongoing pool care. We stand behind every pool we build — long after the last tile is set.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Pool

steps.title: Free Design Consultation
steps.description: Meet with Eric Larsen to discuss your vision, budget, and property. You'll receive a custom 3D design so you can see exactly what your backyard will become — no obligation, no pressure.

steps.title: Transparent Build Process
steps.description: Construction follows our proven six-stage process with guaranteed timelines and a structured draw schedule. You'll always know what's happening, what's next, and exactly what you're paying for.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Paradise
steps.description: Dive into your custom pool backed by our exclusive Larsen's Lifetime Warranty. Plus, our dedicated service team is here whenever you need us — for the life of your pool.

about.label: Why Tampa Bay Trusts Larsen's
about.headline: Fewer Pools. Done Right. Every Single Time.
about.description: Eric Larsen has been in the pool industry since he was a teenager — learning service, repairs, remodeling, and construction from the ground up before founding Larsen's Pool & Spa in 2008. His philosophy is simple: treat every client the way you'd want to be treated, and never take on more projects than you can do exceptionally well. That commitment has earned an A+ BBB rating with zero complaints, 192+ five-star reviews, and national design awards.

features.title: Owner on Every Project
features.description: Eric Larsen is personally involved from your first design consultation through final walkthrough. You're never handed off to a project manager you've never met.

features.title: Larsen's Lifetime Warranty
features.description: One of the only pool builders in Florida offering a lifetime warranty package. We stand behind our work because we build pools that last.

features.title: Guaranteed Completion Timelines
features.description: A structured six-stage draw schedule means you always know what's happening and when. No surprise delays, no mystery billing — just transparency from start to finish.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project includes a detailed proposal, structured six-stage payment schedule, and guaranteed completion timeline. You'll know the full cost before we break ground.

guarantee.headline: The Larsen's Lifetime Warranty
guarantee.description: We're one of the only pool builders in Tampa Bay offering a lifetime warranty — because we build pools meant to last generations. If something isn't right, we make it right. Our A+ BBB rating with zero complaints and Angi Super Service Award every year since 2010 aren't marketing claims — they're the result of treating every pool like it's our own.

faqs.question: How long does a custom pool build take?
faqs.answer: Most custom pools are completed in 8-12 weeks depending on complexity and permitting. We provide a guaranteed completion timeline upfront and follow a structured six-stage build process so you always know exactly where your project stands.

faqs.question: What does the Larsen's Lifetime Warranty cover?
faqs.answer: Our exclusive lifetime warranty covers the structural shell and many key components of your pool. It's one of the most comprehensive warranties offered by any builder in Florida. We'll walk you through every detail during your design consultation.

faqs.question: Will the owner really be involved in my project?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Eric Larsen is personally involved in every single project from the initial design meeting through final walkthrough. You'll have his direct contact information and he oversees every phase of construction.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the Greater Tampa Bay Area including Pinellas County, Hillsborough County, Pasco County, Northern Manatee County, and Southern Hernando County. If you're unsure whether you're in our service area, just give us a call.

faqs.question: How does the payment process work?
faqs.answer: We use a transparent six-stage draw schedule tied to construction milestones. You only pay as each stage is completed and verified. No large upfront deposits, no surprise charges — just honest, structured billing you can plan around.

testimonials.name: Julie D.
testimonials.text: Larsen's Pool & Spa is the creme de la creme of pool companies. Professional and dedicated, they completed our project ahead of schedule. We couldn't be happier with the final result.

testimonials.name: Shane B.
testimonials.text: Big enough to do an amazing job and get it done fast, but small enough to give you personal attention throughout the entire process. Eric and his team are the real deal.

testimonials.name: Sarah R.
testimonials.text: I 200% recommend Larsen's Pool & Spa. Responsive, polite, and professional from start to finish. It was a completely headache-free experience with excellent quality.

contact.headline:
Ready to Build Your
Dream Pool?
contact.subtitle: Schedule a free design consultation with Eric Larsen. See your custom pool in 3D before committing — no pressure, no obligation, just honest advice from an award-winning builder.
